description: Failure-cluster eval manifest for the Learning Allocator (PLAN §3). The allocator-beats-any-fixed-substrate claim is only meaningful if the winning substrate genuinely varies, so clusters are engineered, not hoped for. All three clusters name a real oracle across a visible/sealed (seed 42/7) split: capability=BT01 (filter+form lead macro), knowledge=BT02 (Caterpillar engine-spec lookup lead), policy=BT03 (by-owner phone reveal). 'status=ready' means the oracle exists and the task is gradeable. Live run-wiring (the 'plan' field): BT02 -> 'bt02_spec_lookup' (frozen-vs-S0 discriminator, matrix-validated 2026-06-01) and the BT03 *policy* discriminator is now 'bt03_gated_reveal' (the gated-reveal variant from PR #773 — frozen runs the plan as-authored, the env refuses the reveal mutation without a non-obvious contact-start prerequisite, S1 injects the missing step). The earlier 'boattrader_scrape' rows are kept on the manifest for offline grading but were superseded as the live BT03 discriminator: a layout-drift fixture was empirically structurally insufficient — any drift strong enough to make frozen omit the reveal also removed the groundable target S1's action-replay depends on (the BT03 pincer, see project memory bt03-s1-discriminator-mismatch). Drift remains useful as a *robustness probe* (does S0/S1 degrade gracefully under unrelated layout noise?) but is no longer the discriminator follow-up. BT01 carries no plan on purpose: its oracle is a clean *dealer* lead, which is held out of the live set under the no-dealer-lead run policy — the cluster stays gradeable for offline use.

tasks.name: bt01_lead_capture_visible
tasks.notes: Multi-step macro: apply condition=used + make=Sea Ray + price_max=200000, click a matching listing, submit a clean dealer lead. Oracle = F1 over qualifying leads; pass = >=1 hit AND 0 misses. Capability gap: the base agent fumbles the multi-step filter+form macro.

tasks.name: bt01_lead_capture_sealed
tasks.notes: Held-out instance: identical task graded against a different seeded catalog (seed=7). The visible-minus-sealed score gap is the overfitting check (PLAN §4).

tasks.name: bt02_spec_lookup_visible
tasks.notes: Submit a lead on a Caterpillar-powered boat. Engine make is a detail-page spec, NOT a listing facet, so the agent must open listings and read the spec block — an indexable fact S0 retrieval can cache. Oracle = F1 over leads on Caterpillar boats; pass = >=1 hit AND 0 misses/malformed. 82 qualifying boats at seed=42. Plan JSON is the run-wiring follow-up (oracle is gradeable now).

tasks.name: bt02_spec_lookup_sealed
tasks.notes: Held-out instance: same engine-spec lookup graded against the seed=7 catalog (76 qualifying boats). The visible-minus-sealed gap is the overfitting check (PLAN §4).

tasks.name: bt03_byowner_phone_visible
tasks.notes: Reveal the private seller's phone on a by-owner ('private seller') listing. Policy task: only owner listings expose a phone, so a drift-induced mis-target hits a dealer card. Oracle reads the phone_revealed mutation channel (orthogonal to BT01/BT02 leads); pass = >=1 reveal on an owner listing AND 0 on non-owner. 135 owner listings at seed=42. S1 exemplar early, S3 once frequent. Plan JSON + layout-drift fixture are the run-wiring follow-up (oracle is gradeable now).

tasks.name: bt03_byowner_phone_sealed
tasks.notes: Held-out instance: same by-owner phone-reveal graded against the seed=7 catalog (170 owner listings). The visible-minus-sealed gap is the overfitting check (PLAN §4).

tasks.name: bt03_gated_phone_visible
tasks.notes: Gate variant of the policy discriminator (run with BT03_REVEAL_GATE=1). The minimal plan bt03_gated_reveal.json navigates the by-owner SRP, opens a listing, and clicks 'Show Phone Number' — but OMITS the 'start contact request' prerequisite the gated env demands, so a frozen agent's reveal is a server-side no-op (0 hits). S1 injects the missing prerequisite ahead of the reveal (apply_exemplar_overlay + bt03_gated_inject_exemplar.json) so the same unchanged reveal fires (>=1 hit). Same BT03 oracle (phone_revealed channel), reused unchanged. This is the clean injection discriminator that the layout-drift variant (boattrader_scrape) could not deliver.
